name: Denver Delight Chili
recipeIngredient: 2 lb Boneless round steak, trimmed and cut into 1/2-inch cubes
1 lb Boneless pork loin or shoulder, cut into 1/2-inch cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. In a Dutch oven or saucepot, heat oil until hot; add 1/3 of each beef and pork cubes.
2. Cook, stirring frequently, until brown on all sides, about 5 minutes.
3. Using a slotted spoon, remove meat to a plate, repeating with remaining meat.
4. Drain off any excess fat in the pot; return all meat to the pot.
5. Sprinkle with black pepper and celery salt; stir to coat the meat.
6. Add beef broth and tomato sauce. Bring to a boil; reduce heat to low.
7. Simmer, covered, until meat is nearly tender, about 1 hour.
8. Stir in chili powder, minced onion, cumin, paprika, garlic powder, brown sugar, sage, thyme, and dry mustard.
9. Continue simmering until meat is very tender, about 1 hour. Makes 6 servings.
